title: Parry This!
description: Everything can now be parried like a fireball.
body:
# Parry This!⚔️
Makes most projectiles redirectable in the same way fireballs are. For the purposes of projectile, they act as if you shot/threw them, making enderpearls behave as if you threw them on a parry. Along with arrows acting as if you shot them on a parry for advancements.


### Below is a list of re-directable projectiles:
- Small Fireballs 
- Dragon Fireballs
- Potions (Splash & Lingering)
- Arrows (Spectral, Tipped, & Regular)
- Tridents
- Eggs
- Experience Bottles
- Snowballs
- Enderpearls
- Llama Spit
- Wither Skulls
